Summary: List contract templates with optional filters
Get a contract template by ID
Generate a PDF preview without saving
Get the placeholder catalog for the block editor

Description: Creates a contract in Draft status from a template and lease data. Auto-generates contract number and default financial items from the lease.
Returns a paginated list of contracts filtered by status, lease, and date range.
Summary: Get paginated contract list with filters

Description: Uploads a file attachment (≤10MB, PDF/PNG/JPG/DOCX) to the specified contract. Maximum 20 attachments per contract.
Summary: Upload an attachment to a contract

Description: Returns metadata for all attachments on the specified contract.
Updates the JSONB body of a contract. Only allowed while the contract is in Draft status.
Transitions the contract to PendingSignature status and locks body edits. After this point, changes happen via the Didox integration only.
Renders the contract's resolved body to HTML using the template styling, then converts to PDF via Gotenberg. Returns the PDF file for download.
Summary: Generate and download a PDF for a contract

Description: Regenerates the contract body and increments the version. Only allowed while in Draft status.
Rejects a contract by the specified party (owner or client). Sets the rejection reason and transitions to RejectedByOwner or RejectedByClient.
Polls the Didox API for the current envelope status and reconciles with local contract state.
Loads the template body, resolves placeholders from lease, property, owner, and client data, and returns the pre-filled body for the UI to review and edit.
Summary: Pre-fill contract template with lease and company data
